title: Daily horoscope
metaTitle: Daily Horoscope — All 12 Moon Signs Free | Taara Jyotishyam
metaDescription: Today's free daily horoscope for every Moon sign — mood, work, relationships, and energy. Updated each morning in English, Hindi, Marathi, Kannada, Telugu, and Tamil.
subtitle: Your Moon sign outlook for today — mood, work, relationships, and the energy of the day. Updated every morning.
disclaimer: This is a Moon sign forecast — based on your Chandra rashi (Moon sign at birth), not your sun sign. For a reading grounded in your full chart — lagna, all nine planets, and your current dasha period — get your personalised reading on the home page.
